name: Maya
bio: art history major, full-time crow appreciator. my brain runs on dadaism.

humorProfile.description: Lives for nonsense played completely straight. Finds the wholesome internet exhausting and would rather think about a horse with too many legs.

name: Jordan
bio: writes copy at a brand you've heard of. unfortunately funny in a deadpan way.

humorProfile.description: Says the bleakest thing in the room with a straight face and lets the silence do the work. Allergic to enthusiasm.

name: Riley
bio: film & psych double. fluent in letterboxd reviews and unhinged group chat lore.

humorProfile.description: Soft-launches sincerity through deeply self-aware humor. Loves a meme that hugs you and a meme about loving a meme.

name: Sam
bio: comp lit major. my personality is a recursive joke about being on the internet.

humorProfile.description: Speaks in posts. Every sentence is layered with three references and an apology for the references. Touches grass ironically.
